entity.summary: Base-native decentralized exchange and liquidity hub providing token swaps, DCA and limit-style trading tools, liquidity pools, analytics, and broader liquidity-management products.
entity.notes: Current first-party Hydrex pages explicitly identify the service as a decentralized exchange and liquidity hub built for Base. The current trade surface exposes swap-related tools including DCA, limit-style controls, synth orders, and a linked perpetuals surface, while analytics exposes DEX liquidity, fees, pool, and volume views.

evidence.title: Hydrex
evidence.notes: Current first-party homepage identifies Hydrex as a decentralized exchange and liquidity hub purpose-built for Base and exposes current Trade, Accounts, Earn, Vote, Analytics, Liquidity, and Incentives surfaces.

evidence.title: Hydrex Trade
evidence.notes: Current first-party trading surface exposes active trading controls for DCA orders, price limits, synth orders, token selection, and a linked perpetuals product surface.

evidence.title: Hydrex Analytics
evidence.notes: Current first-party analytics page exposes DEX analytics for Hydrex LP TVL, LP fees, pools, volume, liquidity sources, and related protocol performance data.
